pageContext.name: Bearbrick Benjamin Grant Overview Barcelona 100％ and 400%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy present the Be@rbrick Benjamin Grant Overview Barcelona 100% and 400% Collectible Figure Set!  Standing at approximately 2.75 and 11.02 tall and features beautiful satellite photography of urban Barcelona from Benjamin Grant's book Overview.  Don't miss your chance to add this fine art collectible to your collection!
